"Best Crypto To Buy Now?"

01. Presale Process

The presale process, which is live now, allows buyers to purchase SOLX tokens pre-listing, ensuring the lowest possible price. At each phase of the presale, the price increases. Staking is also an option for presale buyers looking to maximize.

02. TGE, Bridge & Listings

Post presale, the SOLX token will be deployed on multiple chains allowing presale buyers to bridge their tokens to the SOLAXY layer 2 blockchain. The token will be available to trade on both Centralized and Decentralized exchanges.

03. Solaxy Deployment

Solaxy is what Solana has sorely needed. An L2 reducing congestion, downtime, and even increasing speed. It builds upon the beauty of Solana, while making it more scalable with the increase in volume, making it the clear cut solution to take the ecosystem into the future..

How to Buy $SOLX?

01. Get Wallet

You’re gonna need a wallet to hold your $SOLX. There are lots of great ones that are compatible! We recommend Best Wallet for simplicity sake.

Download

02. Add Crypto

If you're looking to swap crypto for $SOLX, you're going to need some! Use your desired exchange for that, or if paying by card, simply select that option.

03. Staking

You can choose to stake your tokens during the presale. The APY is substantial and dynamic, meaning the more people stake, it changes!

FAQs

What is Solaxy?
Solaxy is a groundbreaking Layer 2 solution built on Solana. It delivers unparalleled speed, scalability, and reliability, solving key challenges like network congestion and failed transactions while retaining Solana's efficiency and security.
How Do I Stake?
Staking SOLX is simple. During the presale, participants can choose to stake their tokens to earn additional rewards. After purchasing SOLX, follow the staking instructions provided on the platform to lock your tokens and maximize your yield.
When Can I Claim?
You can claim your staked tokens and presale purchases after the Token Generation Event (TGE). This event coincides with the official listing of SOLX on centralized and decentralized exchanges.
What Is Solana Layer 2?
Solana Layer 2, embodied by Solaxy, is a next-generation blockchain layer designed to enhance the Solana network by increasing scalability, reducing congestion, and ensuring smooth, low-cost transactions even during high traffic. It combines the strengths of Solana with innovative technology to redefine blockchain performance.

What is solaxy?

Solaxy is the next evolution in Layer 2 technology, delivering epic customization, efficiency, and performance. It neutralizes the Solana pain points: network congestion, failed transactions, and scalability limitations, while amplifying the strengths of Solana.

Solaxy doesn't just build on Solana—it unlocks its full potential.

LATEST DEVELOPER UPDATES

Dev Update #11

27th May 2025

We’ve got another major piece of the puzzle coming together — the Solaxy DEX is on the way.

Dev Update #10

19th May 2025

Hey Solaxy Community, the countdown is ON — just 28 days remain until the Solaxy presale ends!

Dev Update #9

15th May 2025

Big news — the Solaxy Testnet Bridge is LIVE and connected to Solana Devnet! The bridge can be accessed at: https://bridge.solaxy.io

Dev Update #8

6th May 2025

Behind the scenes, the team has been making powerful strides to drive the project forward!

Dev Update #7

15th April 2025

We've got some exciting news! The Solaxy Block Explorer will officially be released on April 19th!

Dev Update #6

25th March 2025

We are rolling out additional optimizations to transaction processing and continuing to collaborate with Sovereign on implementing a new caching mechanism.

Dev Update #5

3rd March 2025

Data Availability & Rollup Infrastructure. Benchmarking and refining our infrastructure to enhance performance.

Dev Update #4

15th Feb 2025

Bridging: Unlocking Liquidity. Seamless asset transfers are essential for a functional L2. Our latest progress on bridging

Dev Update #3

20th jan 2025

SP1 zkVM Proofs: Validating the Future. ZK proofs are at the core of ensuring secure and correct state transitions within our rollup.

Dev Update #2

10th jan 2025

Bridging and Data Availability. We're making strides in bridging and data availability for Solaxy.

Dev Update #1

27th dec 2024

Advancing Rollup Infrastructure. We're excited to share major progress on critical components of the Solaxy rollup ecosystem.

Solaxy Crypto Presale The Solana L2

  • Solana's first Layer 2 Chain
  • Infinite scale
  • best meme coin
  • Multi-Chain compatability

Solaxy is the next evolution in blockchain technology, designed to unlock the full potential of the Solana ecosystem. Experience unmatched scalability and a future-proof network built to redefine Solana's capabilities.

What is solaxy?

Solaxy is the next evolution in Layer 2 technology, delivering epic customization, efficiency, and performance. It neutralizes the Solana pain points: network congestion, failed transactions, and scalability limitations, while amplifying the strengths of Solana.

Solaxy doesn't just build on Solana—it unlocks its full potential.

The Solana / Ethereum MultiChain

Zero Down-Time

During times of high-traffic, Solana has notoriously seen times of failed transactions, network congestion, and even down time. Solaxy's scalability and off-chain execution solves that.

Meme Coin Galaxy

Meme coins are driving the Solana, and some would say the entire blockchain industry forward. Solaxy’s customizability and transaction bundling make high volume trading infinitely scalable, ensuring the best meme coin experience.

Solaxy: The Best New Cryptocurrency

Experience seamless performance with our Solana Layer 2, optimized for speed and scalability, while enjoying the robust liquidity and compatibility of our multi-chain token on Ethereum and Solana.

Lightning-Fast Trading

Whether you're deploying a DeFi app or trading memecoins, Solaxy’s off-chain execution and parallel processing deliver ultra-low latency and near-instant finality — even under extreme demand.

Experience seamless performance with our Solana Layer 2, optimized for speed and scalability, while enjoying the robust liquidity and compatibility of our multi-chain token on Ethereum and Solana.

Lightning-Fast Trading

Whether you're deploying a DeFi app or trading memecoins, Solaxy’s off-chain execution and parallel processing deliver ultra-low latency and near-instant finality — even under extreme demand.

Roadmap

02. TGE, Bridge & Listings

Post presale, the SOLX token will be deployed on multiple chains allowing presale buyers to bridge their tokens to the SOLAXY layer 2 blockchain. The token will be available to trade on both Centralized and Decentralized exchanges.

03. Solaxy Deployment

Solaxy is what Solana has sorely needed. An L2 reducing congestion, downtime, and even increasing speed. It builds upon the beauty of Solana, while making it more scalable with the increase in volume, making it the clear cut solution to take the ecosystem into the future..

01. Presale Process

The presale process, which is live now, allows buyers to purchase SOLX tokens pre-listing, ensuring the lowest possible price. At each phase of the presale, the price increases. Staking is also an option for presale buyers looking to maximize.

02. TGE, Bridge & Listings

Post presale, the SOLX token will be deployed on multiple chains allowing presale buyers to bridge their tokens to the SOLAXY layer 2 blockchain. The token will be available to trade on both Centralized and Decentralized exchanges.

03. Solaxy Deployment

Solaxy is what Solana has sorely needed. An L2 reducing congestion, downtime, and even increasing speed. It builds upon the beauty of Solana, while making it more scalable with the increase in volume, making it the clear cut solution to take the ecosystem into the future..

FAQs

What is Solaxy?
Solaxy is a groundbreaking Layer 2 solution built on Solana. It delivers unparalleled speed, scalability, and reliability, solving key challenges like network congestion and failed transactions while retaining Solana's efficiency and security.
How Do I Stake?
Staking SOLX is simple. During the presale, participants can choose to stake their tokens to earn additional rewards. After purchasing SOLX, follow the staking instructions provided on the platform to lock your tokens and maximize your yield.
When Can I Claim?
You can claim your staked tokens and presale purchases after the Token Generation Event (TGE). This event coincides with the official listing of SOLX on centralized and decentralized exchanges.
What Is Solana Layer 2?
Solana Layer 2, embodied by Solaxy, is a next-generation blockchain layer designed to enhance the Solana network by increasing scalability, reducing congestion, and ensuring smooth, low-cost transactions even during high traffic. It combines the strengths of Solana with innovative technology to redefine blockchain performance.
